query:
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(paymentDate, '%Y-%m') as month,
  COUNT(*) as order_count,
  SUM(paymentAmount) as total_amount
FROM orders 
WHERE status != 'cancelled' AND paymentDate IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY DATE_FORMAT(paymentDate, '%Y-%m')
ORDER BY month DESC
LIMIT 10;
